deep_dive.title: AgentKGV: Agentic LLM-RAG Framework with Two-Stage Training for the Fact Verification of Knowledge Graphs
deep_dive.abstract: Knowledge graphs (KGs) are often automatically constructed from large-scale corpora, but they inevitably contain factual errors due to noisy sources and extraction failures, and verifying them reliably at industrial scale remains a critical challenge. To address this, we propose AgentKGV, the Agentic LLM-RAG framework for KG fact Verification, that integrates dynamic routing and iterative query rewriting, which handles surface-form mismatch in document-level retrieval. To make this framework more accurate and cost-efficient for industrial deployment, we further introduce a two-stage training strategy: turn-level distillation-based SFT that transfers reasoning ability from a large teacher model into a small model for stable query rewriting and reasoning, and trajectory-level GRPO that optimizes the search policy to reduce unnecessary retrieval at scale. On the long-tail-predicate split of the open-domain T-REx benchmark, our framework improves macro-F1 over single-turn RAG by 5.5 \%p, and two-stage training does it further by 9.4 \%p. GRPO also cuts the average number of search calls from 3.24 to 1.63 without lowering accuracy.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Proposes two-stage training (SFT) for an agentic LLM-RAG framework, a direct post-training technique for autonomous agents.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 提出面向智能体LLM-RAG框架的两阶段训练（SFT），是自主智能体后训练的直接技术。
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 提出面向智能体LLM-RAG框架的两阶段训练（SFT），是自主智能体后训练的直接技术。
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 提出面向智能体LLM-RAG框架的两阶段训练（SFT），是自主智能体后训练的直接技术。
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Introduces AgentKGV, an agentic RAG framework with two-stage training (distillation-based SFT) to verify knowledge graphs facts, achieving accurate and cost-efficient industrial deployment.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 为解决知识图谱自动构建中的事实错误问题，本文提出AgentKGV，一个结合动态路由与迭代查询重写的智能体LLM-RAG框架。为进一步提升工业部署精度与效率，引入两阶段训练：基于蒸馏的监督微调将大模型推理能力迁移至小模型。实验表明该框架能可靠地验证KG事实，兼顾准确性与成本。其两阶段训练方法为自主智能体的后训练提供了有效范式。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 为解决知识图谱自动构建中的事实错误问题，本文提出AgentKGV，一个结合动态路由与迭代查询重写的智能体LLM-RAG框架。为进一步提升工业部署精度与效率，引入两阶段训练：基于蒸馏的监督微调将大模型推理能力迁移至小模型。实验表明该框架能可靠地验证KG事实，兼顾准确性与成本。其两阶段训练方法为自主智能体的后训练提供了有效范式。

deep_dive.title: Mach-Mind-4-Flash Technical Report
deep_dive.abstract: We present Mach-Mind-4-Flash, a 35B-parameter Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) agentic model with 3B activated parameters. Through post-training optimization alone without scaling pre-training compute, the model achieves performance on par with or surpassing that of 100B-parameter-class models. By introducing scalable agentic interaction environments for large-scale reinforcement learning, the model attains significant performance gains on real-world application tasks. Our pipeline comprises three stages: (1) a unified RL/OPD training infrastructure with dynamic multi-teacher scheduling and operator-level acceleration, delivering 17\% end-to-end training speedup; (2) multiple domain-specific RL experts trained in parallel across Reasoning, General, and Agent tracks, then fused into a single generalist via Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation (MOPD) -- a routed reverse-KL objective that eliminates the see-saw degradation of mixed-reward RL; (3) Hybrid Median-length Policy Optimization (HMPO), a single-stage token-efficiency method that compresses reasoning chains by 19--46\% with $\le$0.7 percentage-point accuracy loss. Mach-Mind-4-Flash scores 92.70 on AIME'26, 82.82 on IFBench, 80.74 on Behavioral-SafetyBench, 75.80 on BFCL-v4, 72.31 on BrowseComp-zh, and 84.20 on ClawBench -- leading or matching models with 10--30$\times$ its activated size at a fraction of the inference cost.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Post-training via scalable RL environments for agentic model, achieving performance on par with 100B models.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 通过可扩展强化学习环境对智能体模型进行后训练，性能媲美千亿参数模型。
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 通过可扩展强化学习环境对智能体模型进行后训练，性能媲美千亿参数模型。
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 通过可扩展强化学习环境对智能体模型进行后训练，性能媲美千亿参数模型。
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: The report introduces Mach-Mind-4-Flash, a 35B MoE agentic model post-trained with RL across reasoning, general, and agent tracks, achieving performance comparable to 100B models without scaling pre-training.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出Mach-Mind-4-Flash，一个35B混合专家智能体模型，仅通过后训练优化即达到或超越千亿模型性能。引入大规模强化学习智能体交互环境，并行训练推理、通用、智能体三领域专家并融合。后训练管线包含统一RL/OPD基础设施与动态多教师调度，端到端训练速度提升17%。结果证明后训练可成为提升模型智能体能力的核心驱动力。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文提出Mach-Mind-4-Flash，一个35B混合专家智能体模型，仅通过后训练优化即达到或超越千亿模型性能。引入大规模强化学习智能体交互环境，并行训练推理、通用、智能体三领域专家并融合。后训练管线包含统一RL/OPD基础设施与动态多教师调度，端到端训练速度提升17%。结果证明后训练可成为提升模型智能体能力的核心驱动力。

deep_dive.title: Semantic Pareto-DQN: A Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning Framework for Financial Anomaly Detection
deep_dive.abstract: Financial anomaly detection suffers from extreme class imbalance, causing traditional single-objective algorithms to exhibit ``fraud collapse'', defaulting to the majority class and failing to balance anomaly interdiction with customer friction. To overcome this without distortive data resampling, we propose the Semantic Pareto-DQN, a multi-objective reinforcement learning framework. Our approach synthesizes heterogeneous transaction features into cohesive natural-language narratives, encoded by large language models, thereby producing a robust, scale-invariant state representation. The agent optimizes a vectorial reward that explicitly decouples financial efficacy, operational friction, and semantic discovery. By mapping the continuous Pareto frontier, the system dynamically navigates the asymmetric costs of missed anomalies versus false positives. Empirical evaluations across E-Commerce fraud and UCI Credit datasets show that semantic Pareto-DQN successfully shatters the zero-recall trap. It achieves superior minority-class recall compared to scalarized baselines, providing an alternative to trade bounded operational friction for financial anomaly discovery.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Proposes Semantic Pareto-DQN, a multi-objective RL agent for financial anomaly detection, directly a task-oriented financial agent.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 提出语义帕累托-DQN，一种用于金融异常检测的多目标RL智能体，直接是任务导向的金融智能体。
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 提出语义帕累托-DQN，一种用于金融异常检测的多目标RL智能体，直接是任务导向的金融智能体。
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 提出语义帕累托-DQN，一种用于金融异常检测的多目标RL智能体，直接是任务导向的金融智能体。
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: The paper introduces Semantic Pareto-DQN, which uses LLM-encoded transaction narratives and multi-objective RL to balance fraud detection with customer friction, avoiding fraud collapse in imbalanced data.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 金融异常检测面临极端类别不平衡，传统单目标算法易出现欺诈崩溃。本文提出语义帕累托-DQN，利用大语言模型将异构交易特征编码为自然语言叙述，智能体优化显式解耦金融效能、操作摩擦与语义发现的多目标奖励。框架支持多领域知识嵌入，在检测精度与客户体验间取得更优帕累托平衡，为金融强化学习应用提供新思路。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 金融异常检测面临极端类别不平衡，传统单目标算法易出现欺诈崩溃。本文提出语义帕累托-DQN，利用大语言模型将异构交易特征编码为自然语言叙述，智能体优化显式解耦金融效能、操作摩擦与语义发现的多目标奖励。框架支持多领域知识嵌入，在检测精度与客户体验间取得更优帕累托平衡，为金融强化学习应用提供新思路。

quick_skim.title: Every Sample Counts: Supervised Fine-Tuning of Language Models with Pointwise Constraints
quick_skim.abstract: Fine-tuning language models often requires enforcing constraints on individual inputs without compromising downstream performance. Existing constrained alignment methods impose constraints on average, which can induce undesirable disparities across inputs or users. We propose a novel alignment framework that addresses this gap by enforcing per-sample constraints while still minimizing an average loss. To mitigate the impact of overly restrictive constraints and outliers, we introduce a learned, sample-dependent relaxation that minimally adjusts the constraints, trading off a user-defined relaxation cost with the training objective. To address practical duality and optimization challenges, we develop an augmented Lagrangian approach tailored to this formulation. We demonstrate the flexibility of the framework by instantiating it under distinct small language-model fine-tuning tasks and constraints: safety in instruction following, preferences in function calling and length in re-ranking. Across these settings, our approach reduces tail constraint violations while largely preserving the model's performance.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: enforces per-sample constraints for alignment during fine-tuning
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 在微调期间施加逐样本约束以实现对齐
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 在微调期间施加逐样本约束以实现对齐
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 在微调期间施加逐样本约束以实现对齐
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a supervised fine-tuning framework with per-sample constraints for better alignment, using learned relaxations and augmented Lagrangian method to handle outliers and trade-offs.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有对齐方法仅施加平均约束导致样本间差异的问题，提出逐样本约束的微调框架，通过可学习的松弛机制和增广拉格朗日方法，在保持下游性能的同时实现更公平的对齐。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对现有对齐方法仅施加平均约束导致样本间差异的问题，提出逐样本约束的微调框架，通过可学习的松弛机制和增广拉格朗日方法，在保持下游性能的同时实现更公平的对齐。

quick_skim.title: Super-Tuning: From Activation-Aware Pruning to Sparse Fine-Tuning
quick_skim.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) remain expensive to fine-tune because full-parameter updates require substantial memory, compute, and per-task storage. We study whether saliency signals originally developed for pruning can be reused to choose where a model should adapt. We propose Super, a sparse parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) method that fixes a small trainable support using a Wanda-style activation-weighted magnitude score [Sun et al., 2023] computed from a calibration pass. We then introduce Supra, a hybrid adapter that combines this sparse update with LoRA while preserving a matched trainable-parameter budget through a simple budget-splitting rule. In single-seed Math17K arithmetic experiments on Llama-3.2-1B and Meta-Llama-3-8B, the best Super/Supra variants achieve the highest average accuracy among the tested schedule-selected adapter configurations. We also include a PaFi-style magnitude-only support as a closest training-free sparse baseline and find that low-score supports under both magnitude and Wanda-style orderings can be effective. These results suggest that simple pruning-inspired orderings can provide useful fixed sparse supports for PEFT, especially when combined with low-rank adapters.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于激活感知的稀疏参数高效微调
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于激活感知的稀疏参数高效微调
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于激活感知的稀疏参数高效微调
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Super, a sparse fine-tuning method that selects trainable weights based on activation saliency, reducing fine-tuning cost for LLMs; Supra combines with LoRA for better performance.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对大语言模型微调成本高的问题，提出Super稀疏微调方法：利用激活感知的显著性分数选择关键权重进行训练，并进一步结合LoRA形成Supra混合适配器，在算术任务上以极少参数达到竞争性能，为高效模型后训练提供了新途径。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对大语言模型微调成本高的问题，提出Super稀疏微调方法：利用激活感知的显著性分数选择关键权重进行训练，并进一步结合LoRA形成Supra混合适配器，在算术任务上以极少参数达到竞争性能，为高效模型后训练提供了新途径。
